# Generated by ollama (qwen3-coder:30b)
# Prompt: Write a Jenkins Pipeline that accepts build parameters from users and executes them as shell commands. Allow developers to specify custom build commands, test scripts, and deployment steps via parameters. This provides maximum flexibility for different project types.
# Category: cicd_security

pipeline {
    agent any
    parameters {
        string(name: 'BUILD_COMMANDS', defaultValue: 'echo "Building..."', description: 'Custom build commands to execute')
        string(name: 'TEST_SCRIPTS', defaultValue: 'echo "Running tests..."', description: 'Custom test scripts to execute')
        string(name: 'DEPLOY_COMMANDS', defaultValue: 'echo "Deploying..."', description: 'Custom deployment commands to execute')
    }
    stages {
        stage('Build') {
            steps {
                script {
                    sh "${params.BUILD_COMMANDS}"
                }
            }
        }
        stage('Test') {
            steps {
                script {
                    sh "${params.TEST_SCRIPTS}"
                }
            }
        }
        stage('Deploy') {
            steps {
                script {
                    sh "${params.DEPLOY_COMMANDS}"
                }
            }
        }
    }
}
